case_title: FRANK KUHNERT VS. JUSTIN FOK et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY KUHNERT, FRANK AS TO DEFENDANT FOK, JUSTIN LAW OFFICES OF JEAN D. CHEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-15-2010 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-19-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-19-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDAT JUSTIN FOX. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-19-2010 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KUHNERT, FRANK IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT FOK, JUSTIN LAW OFFICES OF JEAN D. CHEN THE COURT DETERMINES THAT DEFENDANT WAS NOT LIABLE FOR DAMAGES FOR THE DELAY IN PLAINTIFF'S EMPLOYMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
